globalNews.title: Taylor Swift marries Travis Kelce in NYC ceremony officiated by Adam Sandler
globalNews.summary: The star-studded celebration saw several streets in Midtown Manhattan shut, as hordes of fans gathered outside the arena.

globalNews.title: Brutal heat cancels Fourth of July events, from DC to Philadelphia
globalNews.summary: More than 165 million people are enduring dangerous heat and humidity, with temperatures expected to stay at 38C (100F) for several days.

globalNews.title: Keiko Fujimori declared winner of Peru's presidential election weeks after vote
globalNews.summary: The daughter of disgraced president Alberto Fujimori is declared winner of tight race nearly a month after voting took place.

globalNews.title: Large crowds gather in Tehran on first day of Ayatollah Khamenei's funeral
globalNews.summary: Ali Khamenei's body will lie in state in Tehran's Grand Mosalla until Monday, before travelling across Iran and Iraq.

globalNews.title: Ukraine hits major oil terminal in Russia's St Petersburg
globalNews.summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky says the target is key infrastructure "that generates revenue for Russia's war".

cryptoNews.title: Bollinger Bands creator eyes Bitcoin bear-market end, 'W'-shaped reversal
cryptoNews.summary: Bitcoin price strength could "break" the entire downtrend if the reversal pattern completed, John Bollinger suggested in light of the BTC rebound.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Revolut to delist USDT in August, citing regulatory and risk concerns
cryptoNews.summary: Revolut notified some customers it will delist USDT after Aug. 31, with remaining holdings automatically converted into users’ base currency.

cryptoNews.title: Tim Draper denies moving Bitcoin, reiterates $250,000 BTC prediction
cryptoNews.summary: Tim Draper denies moving Bitcoin after blockchain analysts linked him to a wallet that transferred 1,000 BTC to Coinbase Prime.

cryptoNews.title: Bitcoin profit and loss ratio falls to 43-month low
cryptoNews.summary: Bitwise chief investment officer Matt Hougan said the bottom is “closer than ever,” while a Swan Bitcoin analyst suggested investors buy now at a discount rather than overpaying later.

aiNews.title: The only AI glossary you’ll need this year
aiNews.summary: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.

aiNews.title: The browser wars aren’t about search anymore — here are the best alternatives to Chrome and Safari
aiNews.summary: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.

aiNews.title: Mark Zuckerberg tells staff that AI agents haven’t progressed as quickly as he’d hoped
aiNews.summary: At an internal meeting, the Meta CEO reportedly said that AI development efforts were not moving as quickly as anticipated.

aiNews.title: Jersey Mike’s IPO illustrates how bad the AI hype has become
aiNews.summary: Just for kicks, I took a look at Jersey Mike's IPO documents. Surely a sandwich shop would have no need to mention AI. But lo and behold.

aiNews.title: Meta quietly launches vibe-coded gaming app Pocket
aiNews.summary: Meta has quietly launched Pocket, an experimental AI app that lets users generate and share interactive mini games using text prompts.
